summary: Phase 3 Mestari copy editor (backend + admin UI + public reflection) — fully tested. 18/18 pytest cases pass (9 new + 9 sprint A regression). Admin page loads, saves persist, public endpoint reflects edits, /mestari renders updated FI copy after lang toggle, and quiz entry happy-path still works.
critical_code_review_comments: BackOfficeMestariCopy.jsx is ~660 lines — close to the 700-line guideline. Future edits should extract the per-section editors into smaller components (HeroEditor, MethodEditor, etc.) to keep it maintainable.
mestari_copy.py: array lengths are locked (cred=4, method cards=4, etc.) — admin cannot add/remove items. Acceptable given grid layout, but worth documenting in admin UI copy if users ask.
seed_data_creation: None (each test resets overrides via PUT {} before/after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mestari copy editor stack is solid. Endpoints: GET /api/mestari/copy (public), GET+PUT /api/admin/mestari/copy (X-Admin-Token). Deep-merge confirmed: partial hero.fi.headline PUT preserves hero.fi.sub + hero.en. Empty PUT body resets. Paste-bomb (5000 chars) truncates to 240 silently. Bad shape (string instead of dict) does not break — defaults preserved. Admin UI at /back-office/mestari-copy: sessionStorage key 'putki-hq-admin-token', all 11 section panels render, save-top + save-bottom both work, public /mestari reflects edits after FI lang toggle (button labelled 'FI' in lang switcher). All 21 mestari-* testids regression-checked. Sprint A regression (Voita lead source + entry fields) still green.

detailed_results.backend_pytest: 18 passed in 6.27s — test_mestari_copy.py (9 new: full tree + all top keys + default FI headline; admin auth 401 no/bad token, 200 with token; PUT auth 401; deep-merge preserves untouched fields; PUT {} resets; paste-bomb truncated <=240; bad shape preserves defaults) + test_sprint_a_mestari_voita.py (9 regression: voita lead source variants + entry channel/confidence/pending_id + 422 on out-of-range)
detailed_results.frontend_admin_page: PASS — back-office-mestari-copy loaded with sessionStorage token, 11/11 section panels found, both save buttons present, editing hero FI headline + clicking mec-save-top triggered Saved status, public /api/mestari/copy reflected new value
detailed_results.public_mestari_reflection: PASS after FI lang toggle — page initially renders in EN; clicking the FI button in the top-right lang toggle re-renders with the new backend FI headline ('FI live test headline'). All 21 mestari-* testids present.
detailed_results.quiz_regression: PASS — hero CTA click on /mestari shows Question 1/5 ('Altavastaajan ystävä vai suosikin halaaja? Rehellisesti.') with 4 answer options in FI
